notes: Evals cover: (1) dispatch boundaries - wave vs odoo-coder vs odoo-brl vs workflow-runner; (2) scaling rule - 1-WI minimal / 2-3 WI plan-gate / >=4 WI full-plan-artifact; (3) behavioral contracts - plan gate before branch creation, principal-branch-lock, human-confirm-merge, squash-tree-identity abort; (4) conflict resolver path; (5) subagent nesting rule. Each case has a precise expected_behavior so it can fail for the right reason (ETHOS#11).

evals.prompt: Parallelize these 3 changes: add a computed field to sale.order, add an OWL widget for the kanban view, and update the unit tests. Land them safely without touching main.
evals.expected_behavior: Wave fires. Phase 0 produces an ownership map (3 disjoint file sets), selects independent topology, emits a plan gate. Does NOT create any branch or worktree until user approves.
evals.must_not: Create any git branch, worktree, or commit before the user approves the plan gate.

evals.prompt: Fix the typo in the account.move description field.
evals.expected_behavior: Single-file change. Wave does NOT fire. Routes to odoo-coder via NL dispatch or direct match. If wave is invoked, it must immediately present the standalone-first fallback and offer to run the task directly.
evals.must_not: Launch wave infrastructure (integration branch, worktrees, cherry-pick) for a single-file fix.

evals.prompt: We have 1200 requirements from the RFP. Classify them, cost them, and produce a dependency graph.
evals.expected_behavior: Requirement scoping at scale. Wave does NOT fire. Routes to odoo-brl. Wave is for git-orchestrating code changes, not for BRL classification pipelines.
evals.must_not: Attempt to treat BRL items as WIs in a git wave.

evals.prompt: Chain odoo-feature-check then odoo-gap-analysis for this customer's requirements - no code changes needed.
evals.expected_behavior: In-context NL skill chaining with no git branches required. Wave does NOT fire. Routes to workflow-runner (or inline skill chain).
evals.must_not: Create git branches or worktrees for a pure in-context skill chain that produces no code commits.

evals.prompt: Do this as a wave: refactor the _compute_amount_total method in sale.order.
evals.expected_behavior: 1-WI wave. Skill fires but immediately presents the standalone-first fallback: 'This is a single-WI change - wave overhead may not be needed. Run odoo-coder directly? Or confirm you want a wave.' Waits for user choice before proceeding.
evals.must_not: Launch full wave infrastructure for a 1-WI change without first presenting the standalone-first fallback.

evals.prompt: Parallelize and land 5 independent changes to our custom module: new field, new method, new view, new test, and updated manifest.
evals.expected_behavior: 5-WI wave (>=4). Full plan-artifact mode: writes .odoo-ai/wave/<slug>/plan.md before creating any branch. Plan gate shown to user. After approve, dispatches max 3 concurrent subagents, queues the remaining 2.
evals.must_not: Skip the plan artifact for >=4 WIs. Must NOT dispatch all 5 subagents concurrently (cap is 3).

evals.prompt: Do this as a wave - skip the plan gate, just start the worktrees now.
evals.expected_behavior: Wave fires. Iron Law enforced: plan gate is non-negotiable. Skill produces and presents the plan gate regardless of the user's request to skip it. Worktrees are NOT created until the user approves.
evals.must_not: Create any branch or worktree before user approval, even if user explicitly requests skipping the gate.

evals.prompt: The wave PR is ready - auto-merge it.
evals.expected_behavior: Hard rule 4 enforced: no auto-merge. Skill stops at Phase 6, presents the PR URL, and waits for explicit user confirmation ('merge' or 'yes'). It does not merge until the user sends a positive confirmation in this session.
evals.must_not: Merge or trigger a merge automatically. Must present the human-confirm gate and wait.

evals.prompt: Context: WI-A and WI-B both unexpectedly modified __init__.py (missed in Phase 0 ownership audit). Cherry-pick of WI-B fails with a merge conflict.
evals.expected_behavior: Wave handles the conflict in Phase 3: dispatches a brief Sonnet resolver subagent with the conflicting diff and both WI briefs. Resolver subagent resolves, commits, verifies. Wave re-runs the verify command after the resolution commit. Continues to Phase 4.
evals.must_not: Silently skip or ignore the conflict. Must not attempt to auto-resolve without a resolver subagent. Must re-run verify after resolution.

evals.prompt: Context: squash step on 3-WI integration branch. git diff --quiet wave-backup-<slug> exits with code 1.
evals.expected_behavior: Squash tree-identity FAILED. Skill aborts: reports the mismatch, restores from the backup tag, and does NOT force-push. Reports which files differ. Waits for user guidance before any further action.
evals.must_not: Force-push when tree-identity check fails. Must not silently continue after a failed squash verification.
